notes.en: Aromatic heirloom variety; organically cultivated with traditional rain-fed methods.

duration_days.quote: Suwandel is an heirloom rice variety, cultivated organically with traditional rain-fed methods in the southern lowlands of Sri Lanka. It is usually 3 months before harvest.

traits.quote: Suwandel is an heirloom rice variety, cultivated organically with traditional rain-fed methods in the southern lowlands of Sri Lanka
